intro:
Search. Spot. Discover.
Explore beautiful scenes and find hidden objects.
Train your brain and master every scavenger hunt.
description:
Explore detailed scenes and test your observation skills in this relaxing hidden object adventure.
Search every corner, zoom in to spot tiny clues, and discover cleverly hidden items across colorful environments. From cozy interiors to lively outdoor locations, each level offers a new scavenger hunt challenge.
Perfect for fans of puzzle games and brain teasers, this search-and-find experience starts easy and becomes more challenging as you progress.

• Beautiful, detailed scenes
• Smooth and intuitive controls
• Increasing difficulty
• Fun for all ages

Sharpen your focus. Train your brain.
Can you find them all?
